nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values:
0: A rain-slicked urban street in a dense metropolis at midnight. The focus is on vibrant neon signage in shades of electric blue and amber, reflecting in deep puddles on the asphalt. Glowing billboards and flickering LED screens fill the air with light. No central people, just the heavy, high-contrast atmosphere of a city that never sleeps. Cinematic 35mm style, sharp reflections, nocturnal energy.
1: A close-up, high-angle shot of a minimalist luxury apartment balcony overlooking a blurred city. A single white T-shirt is draped over a modern chair, catching the blue glow of distant city lights. An open window lets in a soft, hazy mist that mimics the lingering scent of perfume. The lighting is a blend of cool exterior blue and a warm, dim interior glow. Focus on textures of fabric, glass, and the distant bokeh of traffic.
2: An expansive, wide-angle landscape of the city skyline during the blue hour just before sunrise. A light morning frost and a cool, crisp fog roll over the skyscrapers as the seasons change. The vibrant neons have dimmed, leaving a monochromatic blue palette. The sky is a vast gradient of deep navy to pale grey. The scene is quiet, empty, and bittersweet. Photorealistic, cinematic wide shot, serene and cold.
Glitchcore style, f/0.8 aperture, realistic creamy bokeh, subject isolation with extremely blurred background

nodes.title: Model link
widgets_values:
## Report workflow issue

If you found any issues when running this workflow, [report template issue here](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)


## Model links

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_4b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)

**loras**

**vae**

- [ae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/

│   ├── 📂 loras/

│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── ae.safetensors
```

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Flowing, very slow camera panning, zooming in

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values:
色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，倒着走

widgets_values: By default, we set the video to a smaller size for users with low VRAM. If you have enough VRAM, you can change the size
